original_title: SSP-023 Amateur No Makeup Raw Creampie 023 Reika 30 Years Old Celebrity Attendant
overview: Occupation is an attendant of an entertainer. Aiming to become an actress and working as an extra for TV and movies, she was introduced to a job by her agency... and accepted the offer, thinking it would be useful to make connections. Updating the actress's official blog and tweeting was also one of my jobs. While replying to an ardent fan, she fell under the illusion that she had become an actress, and ended up getting off the hook... One day, an incident in which an actress was attacked by a fan... was discovered to have been caused by her email, and she was fired. . While I was in a hurry to lose my place to stay, I found a mouth of a high-income part-time job and came to an interview. [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
